source.update_note: 2026-27 season data from TPWD Outdoor Annual season dates page. The TPW Commission approved 2026-27 seasons on April 1, 2026. Chachalaca and quail dates aligned to Nov 1 - Feb 28 per recent rule change.

species.name: Chachalaca
species.hunting_units: Cameron, Hidalgo, Starr, and Willacy counties only

licenses.name: Resident Hunting License
licenses.covers: Any legal bird/animal (terrestrial vertebrates); valid to Aug 31

licenses.name: Non-resident General Hunting License
licenses.covers: Any legal bird/animal including deer; valid to Aug 31

licenses.name: Non-resident Special 5-Day Small Game/Exotic Hunting License
licenses.covers: Exotic animals and small game for 5 consecutive days

licenses.name: Senior Resident Hunting License (age 65+)
licenses.covers: Same as Resident Hunting License for seniors

licenses.name: Youth Hunting License (under age 17)
licenses.covers: Hunting license valid for any legal bird/animal

licenses.name: Upland Game Bird Endorsement
licenses.covers: Required in addition to hunting license to hunt any upland game bird

licenses.name: Super Combo License (Resident)
licenses.covers: Hunting + fishing license + 5 state endorsements at a discount

key_notes.title: An Upland Game Bird Endorsement ($7) is required in addition to a valid hunting license to hunt any upland game bird in Texas.

sources.label: TPWD — Hunting Endorsements
sources.evidence: Upland Game Bird Endorsement: $7. Required to hunt upland game birds including quail, pheasant, chachalaca.

key_notes.title: Chachalaca hunting is limited to four counties in the Rio Grande Valley: Cameron, Hidalgo, Starr, and Willacy.

sources.label: TPWD — Chachalaca Season & Regulations
sources.evidence: Chachalaca: 4 of 254 counties have Chachalaca seasons: Cameron, Hidalgo, Starr, Willacy.

key_notes.title: Only cock (male) pheasants may be taken. Proof of sex (leg with spur or full plumage) must remain attached until final processing.

sources.label: TPWD — Pheasant Season & Regulations
sources.evidence: Daily bag: 3 cocks. Possession: 9 cocks. Proof of sex: one leg including spur attached, or entire plumage attached, until final destination.

key_notes.title: No open season for Mearn's (Montezuma) quail. Only Bobwhite, Scaled (blue), and Gambel's quail may be taken.

sources.label: TPWD — Quail Season & Regulations
sources.evidence: Bobwhite quail, Scaled quail (blue quail) and Gambel's quail. No open season for Mearn's (Montezuma) quail.

key_notes.title: Pheasant season is limited to 37 counties in the Panhandle and South Plains regions.
